About this item

  • Refurbished 3050 or 5050 SFF PC, Equipped with a FAST Intel Core i7 6th Generation CPU Processor
  • Memory: 16GB DDR4 RAM
  • Hard drive: 512GB SSD Storage offers fast boot times, quick access to files
  • 300Mbps USB WiFi Adapter Dongle provides reliable wireless connectivity.
  • Running on Windows 11 Pro, this PC benefits from the latest features
  • UK 3-Pin Power Cable Lead Provided.
  • Comprehensive 12-month return-back warranty that covers all hardware repairs or issues. If any part needs fixing or replacing within this period, we've got you covered.

What is Amazon Renewed?

Amazon Renewed is your trusted destination for refurbished products that are inspected, tested, and cleaned in accordance with Amazon Renewed requirements to be fully functional.

Quality you can afford

Amazon Renewed products offer an affordable option so that you can save on the brands you love.

Products you can trust

All products have been professionally inspected, tested and cleaned to be fully functional.

Purchases with an impact

Your Amazon Renewed purchase extends the lifetime of this product and reduces waste.

Guaranteed by Amazon

Products sold by third-party sellers are backed by the commercial Amazon Renewed Guarantee in addition to statutory consumer rights enforceable against the third-party sellers and in conjunction with Amazon's or the seller’s Return Policy and the A-to-Z Guarantee.

What should I expect to receive with my Amazon Renewed purchase?

All Amazon Renewed purchases will come with the accessories that shipped with the new product. These accessories may not be original but will be compatible and fully functional. Amazon Renewed products will be packaged either in the original packaging or in a new and clean cardboard box. Premium condition products will come in premium packaging.

Model Year

2017

In what condition can I expect my Amazon Renewed product to be?

The product will be restored to its original factory settings and will be in one of the following cosmetic conditions: Premium, Excellent, Good or Acceptable. Learn more
Shop for smartphones, computers, laptops, tablets, home and kitchen appliances, game consoles, office products and more. Visit Amazon Renewed

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Amazon Customer
    1 out of 5 stars
    Hardware incompatible with Windows 11
    WARNING!!! The contained CPU is not compatible with Windows 11. The Intel Core i7-6700 Processor is a 6th Generation Intel CPU. Windows 11 requires 8th generation or newer. This can prevent security updated from Windows. This should have been highlighted, but wasn't. I'll be returning the product.

    • Honest Steve
      5.0 out of 5 stars Works fine, very good value compared to a New price, good support.
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 2 February 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Very pleased. My first ever "refrub" purchase, and it has been very good so far. Obviously a huge saving , so I was concerned as to how good it would be for the moeny, but it is functioning very well. I did have one quite technical query about the Ram memory, but I contacted the company and got a prompt, very clear, and very helpful reply; excellent. I very much hope of course it continues to work fine; so far so good. I am in need fo a laptop soon also, and on this expereince I will be happy to try this company again!

    • Mak1
      4.0 out of 5 stars Does the job.
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 14 September 2025
      Verified Purchase
      Delivered quickly and in good condition. Easy to set up, but had a slight problem with the cursor not showing up on screen. Rectified by purchasing a compatible Dell mouse.
      There is a Bluetooth page, but it seems Bluetooth function is not installed. Rectified by purchasing Bluetooth plug in. All working well now.
      Made e mail application for warranty and received reply "OK, all done". Short and sweet.
      Altogether, a not too expensive way of upgrading to Windows 11. Just hope it has all necessary functions for future upgrades.
      Read more
